since_last: 71% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.82%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -2.08% · Gold -2.83% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 71% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.82%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.82%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.96%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.96%, CEVA +10.92%, INTC +10.65%, SMCI +10.37%, LSCC +9.91%. Laggards: INOD -6.85%, IBM -4.78%, SPCX -4.55%, WDAY -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.55% at $183.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
